category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts DBML to SQL and vice versa; DBML CLI docs describe conversion/generation between formats from the command line.
display_name_sources: Official DBML docs title the page CLI and package instructions use @dbml/cli; source_facts.name is dbml-cli.
docs_sources: Official DBML CLI page documents installation and conversion commands; DBML home page describes the language and command-line tool.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official DBML home says DBML is open-sourced on GitHub and links to holistics/dbml.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists db2dbml, dbml2sql, and sql2dbml; DBML docs describe DBML as a database schema DSL with a command-line conversion tool.
